'''Upthrust Esports Challengers Showdown''' is a [[Battlegrounds_Mobile_India|BGMI]] tournament hosted by Upthrust Esports. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator |lang=hi |b1=Gamezo Tech |b2=Saltyy |b3=SardarjiYT }} ===Format=== * '''Challengers Showdown S2''':'' May 6th - 29th, 2024 ** 32 teams. *** 26 invited teams. *** 6 qualified teams. ** Squad, {{Abbr/TPP}}. * '''Redemption Week''':'' May 6th - 8th ** 32 teams, 3 matchdays. **{{bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} qualify for ''Semi Finals''. ** {{bgcolortext|stay|Remaining 24 teams}} proceed to ''Eliminator Week''. * '''Eliminator Week''':'' May 13th - 15th ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. **{{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Semi Finals''. * '''Semi Finals''':'' May 20th - 22nd ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|Top 8 teams}} from Redemption Week. *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|Top 16 teams}} from Eliminator Week. **{{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Grand Finals''. * '''Grand Finals''':'' May 27th - 29th ** 16 teams. ** 3 matchdays. {{PUBGM 2023 Points System}} ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|localcurrency=inr |{{Slot|localprize=275000
